root.name: Add the text box 'Roll Movement Demonstration' below the main title on slide 5
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent adds the required text box with correct content and positioning on slide 5, with no extraneous modifications.

children.name: Text Box Creation and Content Correctness
children.description: Check that a new text box containing exactly 'Roll Movement Demonstration' was inserted on slide 5, and ONLY on slide 5.

children.name: Text Box Position: Below Main Title
children.description: Check that the 'Roll Movement Demonstration' text box is positioned visually below the main title on slide 5.

children.name: No Extraneous Modifications on Slide 5
children.description: Checks that no other elements or formatting besides the required text box were modified or added on slide 5.

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Collect all diffs affecting slide 5
    extraneous = []
    # Elements: Only the required text box should be added.
    # We use python-pptx to count added/deleted/modified shapes
    from pptx import Presentation
    prs_orig = Presentation(original_ppt_path)
    prs_mod = Presentation(modified_ppt_path)
    slide_orig = prs_orig.slides[4]
    slide_mod = prs_mod.slides[4]
    orig_texts = set(shp.text_frame.text.strip() for shp in slide_orig.shapes if shp.has_text_frame)
    mod_texts = set(shp.text_frame.text.strip() for shp in slide_mod.shapes if shp.has_text_frame)
    new_texts = mod_texts - orig_texts
    # Should only be the required string
    if any((t for t in new_texts if t != "Roll Movement Demonstration")):
        return "Extraneous text boxes were added to slide 5.", 0.0
    # If other shapes were added, check type (e.g., images, charts, etc.)
    orig_shape_cnt = len(slide_orig.shapes)
    mod_shape_cnt = len(slide_mod.shapes)
    if mod_shape_cnt > orig_shape_cnt + 1:
        return "More than one new shape was added.", 0.0
    # Could also check for formatting changes, but keep simple
    return "No extraneous modifications detected on slide 5.", 1.0

children.name: No Modifications on Other Slides
children.description: Checks that only slide 5 is changed; all other slides are untouched.

metadata.task: On slide 5, Add the text box 'Roll Movement Demonstration' below the main title
